about.description: Assurant's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Assurant operate in India?
faq.a: Assurant operates 1 active center in India. Two are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Assurant have centers in?
faq.a: Assurant's India presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of centers does Assurant run in India?
faq.a: Assurant runs GCC/GIC centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Assurant's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Assurant's India operations is available in the full profile.
